calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-03-2014 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Directing Transfer Of Interest In Real Property To The Estate Of Gladys G. Thomas, The Rightful Owner
Off Calendar May-16-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Greer Smith for and with Bertram Thomas (Executor). Daryl Thomas in Propria Persona. Other Siblings were also present.

At the commencement of court Daryl Thomas' position was that he was not willing to execute a Quit Claim Deed. Daryl also expressed concern about Bertram's roll as Executor. The Court explained that the property will go to the Estate of Gladys Thomas, then sold and then distributed four ways equally to each of the Siblings. Ms. Greer also confirmed that Daryl Thomas will get 25%. Daryl Thomas stated that he is now willing to voluntarly sign the Quit Claim Deed over to Bertram as Executor of the Estate of Gladys Thomas. The Court is prepared to sign the order based on Daryl's willingness to execute the Quit Claim Deed. The Court granted the Petition for Order Directing Transfer of Interest in Real Property to The Estate of Gladys G. Thomas (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-27-2012 Granted Per Written Order
